description: A service-based business that solves a client problem directly through manual or semi-manual work such as writing, editing, design, content production, research, or management support.
best_for: Users with a practical skill that clients already pay for
Users who want to start fast without building a full product
bad_for: Users who strongly dislike client interaction
Users with very little available time and no repeatable workflow
mvp_examples: A pilot offer for one client segment
evaluation_points: Is the service tied to a real client pain point?
Can the scope be defined clearly enough to price?
Can trust be built quickly through samples or proof?
starter_next_steps: Pick one client type and one painful problem
Package the service into a simple offer
Reach out to a small set of likely first clients
